failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: UICnSX
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to generate embedding: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:48.268767+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "Community clinic walk-in hours and eligibility.", "model": "BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed

1. Test Case ID: UICnSX
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to generate embedding: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:48.268767+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "Community clinic walk-in hours and eligibility.", "model": "BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed

1. Test Case ID: UICnSX
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to generate embedding: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:48.268767+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "Community clinic walk-in hours and eligibility.", "model": "BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed

1. Test Case ID: dt8eBx
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to generate batch embeddings: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:48.796880+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"texts": ["First document to embed", "Second document to embed", "Third document to embed"], "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/batch

1. Test Case ID: dt8eBx
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to generate batch embeddings: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:48.796880+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"texts": ["First document to embed", "Second document to embed", "Third document to embed"], "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/batch

1. Test Case ID: dt8eBx
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to generate batch embeddings: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:48.796880+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"texts": ["First document to embed", "Second document to embed", "Third document to embed"], "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/batch

1. Test Case ID: W35dn3
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to compute similarity: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:49.419960+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text1": "Tenant organizing workshop next Tuesday.", "text2": "RSVP for the housing rights clinic.", "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/similarity

1. Test Case ID: W35dn3
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to compute similarity: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:49.419960+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text1": "Tenant organizing workshop next Tuesday.", "text2": "RSVP for the housing rights clinic.", "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/similarity

1. Test Case ID: W35dn3
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to compute similarity: Modal Function invocation requested, but modal SDK is unavailable","timestamp":"2026-04-17T18:36:49.419960+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text1": "Tenant organizing workshop next Tuesday.", "text2": "RSVP for the housing rights clinic.", "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/similarity

1. Test Case ID: nKiGTg
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Internal server error"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/reindex/spawn?clean=true&stream=true'

1. Test Case ID: nKiGTg
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Internal server error"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/reindex/spawn?clean=true&stream=true'

1. Test Case ID: PhlpNQ
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Internal server error"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"chunking_config": null, "crawl_config": null, "metadata": {}, "url": "https://A.COM", "user_id": "0"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper

1. Test Case ID: PhlpNQ
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Internal server error"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"chunking_config": null, "crawl_config": null, "metadata": {}, "url": "https://A.COM", "user_id": "0"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper

1. Test Case ID: XvzGbx
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Internal server error"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper?user_id=null&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: XvzGbx
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Internal server error"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper?user_id=null&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

testcase.name: DELETE /api/v1/modal-jobs/registry/{gateway_job_id}
testcase.error:
Failed Health Check
Too many generated examples are filtered out for this operation
Unable to identify the specific parameter. Common causes: - Complex regex patterns that match few strings - Multiple overlapping constraints (pattern + format + enum)
Tip: Simplify constraints or widen acceptable value ranges or bypass this health check using `--suppress-health-check=filter_too_much`.

testcase.name: POST /api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper/{job_id}/cancel
